en_title: PlayStation Promises 'Many More Stories to Tell' With Kratos in Future, After God of War Laufey
cn_title: 《战神》《劳菲》之后，PlayStation承诺奎托斯还有更多故事
subtitle: 奎爷永不缺席
opus_summary: 在《战神：劳菲》公布后，圣莫妮卡工作室讨论了奎托斯作为系列标志性角色的未来。创意总监Cory Barlog表示「永远会有奎托斯游戏」，官方账号也承诺「还有更多故事要讲」。尽管新作以劳菲为主角引发争议，但工作室强调这只是系列扩展，并非告别奎托斯。此外，工作室还公布了《战神》希腊三部曲重制版，奎托斯将再次成为焦点。

paragraphs.en: God of War developer Santa Monica Studio has discussed Kratos' future as the figurehead of its flagship franchise, following the reveal of its Faye-starring next chapter, God of War Laufey .
paragraphs.cn: 《战神》开发商圣莫妮卡工作室在公布了以劳菲为主角的新作《战神：劳菲》后，讨论了奎托斯作为系列旗舰角色未来的发展。

paragraphs.en: Speaking in an interview uploaded to PlayStation's YouTube channel, Santa Monica Studio head of creative Cory Barlog said that "there's always going to be Kratos games" — a position backed up by a later post from the company's official social media account, which stated that the studio had "many more stories to tell with him."
paragraphs.cn: 在PlayStation YouTube频道发布的一段采访中，圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监Cory Barlog表示「永远会有奎托斯游戏」——这一立场随后得到了工作室官方社交媒体账号的呼应，称他们「还有更多关于他的故事要讲」。

paragraphs.en: Early reaction to God of War Laufey has been mixed , with some fans praising the game's combat and visuals, while others have been criticizing the simplistic gameplay seen in Laufey's opening section — and, predictably, the fact that fan-favorite Kratos wasn't center stage. (For a full catch-up, we’ve got an explainer on Faye herself for more on her story.)
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》的早期反响褒贬不一，部分玩家称赞游戏的战斗和画面，而另一些则批评劳菲开场部分的玩法过于简单——当然，还有玩家不满人气角色奎托斯未能占据中心舞台。（如需全面了解，我们有一篇关于劳菲本人的介绍文章，可了解更多她的故事。）

paragraphs.en: "Faye is, while it's a different thing, it's still part of the larger tapestry of what we truly really want to explore, all of these different characters in there," Barlog said of the new game. "But there's always going to be Kratos games, like, throughout the whole history. We're super excited about that."
paragraphs.cn: 「劳菲虽然是一个不同的故事，但它仍然是我们真正想要探索的宏大叙事的一部分，所有这些不同的角色都在其中，」Barlog谈到新作时说道。「但奎托斯的游戏会一直存在，贯穿整个系列历史。我们对此感到非常兴奋。」

paragraphs.en: "Oh for sure," added God of War Laufey director Ariel Lawrence. "We can't not tell stories about the big guy."
paragraphs.cn: 「哦，那当然，」《战神：劳菲》总监Ariel Lawrence补充道。「我们不可能不讲述那个大块头的故事。」

paragraphs.en: Our first glimpse at God of War Laufey, seen in a 20-minute gameplay segment aired at the end of this week's PlayStation State of Play showcase, began with Kratos and Atreus burning Faye's body — as seen in 2018's God of War. Kratos then pops up again shortly after, aiding Faye while she's briefly imprisoned. It remains unclear if Kratos will make any other appearances before Laufey's credits roll, or if these brief glimpses of the hero are it, as he's then busy with the events of God of War Ragnarök.
paragraphs.cn: 我们对《战神：劳菲》的首次一瞥，来自本周PlayStation State of Play展示会末尾播出的20分钟实机片段，开场是奎托斯和阿特柔斯焚烧劳菲的尸体——正如2018年《战神》中所见。随后奎托斯很快再次出现，在劳菲短暂被囚禁时帮助了她。目前尚不清楚奎托斯是否会在《劳菲》的演职员表滚动前再次登场，或者这些短暂的露面就是全部，因为他随后要忙于《战神：诸神黄昏》的事件。

paragraphs.en: "Kratos is the God of War – we have many more stories to tell with him," Santa Monica Studio's official X/Twitter account wrote in a post issued last night. "For now, we're excited to take fans on a journey into the afterlife of the gods with Faye and hope you’ll come along for the ride!"
paragraphs.cn: 「奎托斯就是战神——我们还有更多关于他的故事要讲，」圣莫妮卡工作室官方X/Twitter账号昨晚发文写道。「目前，我们很高兴能带领玩家与劳菲一起踏上众神来世之旅，希望你们能一同前往！」

paragraphs.en: Of course, Santa Monica Studio has also announced a remake of the God of War Greek trilogy remake — which, of course, will see Kratos back in the spotlight. The original God of War launched back in 2005 for PS2, with its sequel arriving two years later. God of War 3, for PS3, then debuted in 2010. No release date for the God of War Trilogy Remake was announced, and work is still in its "early stages."
paragraphs.cn: 当然，圣莫妮卡工作室还公布了《战神》希腊三部曲重制版——这无疑会让奎托斯重回聚光灯下。初代《战神》于2005年在PS2上发售，续作两年后推出，而PS3平台的《战神3》则于2010年问世。《战神三部曲重制版》尚未公布发售日期，目前仍处于「早期开发阶段」。

paragraphs.en: "We'll always tell stories about Kratos, but I think for us, it was just a chance to talk about somebody who was so pivotal to the beginning," Barlog told IGN previously in an exclusive interview , which discussed why Faye was chosen as the protagonist. "For us, it's not a departure; it's more of an expansion," he added.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们永远会讲述奎托斯的故事，但对我们来说，这只是一个机会，去讲述一个对故事开端如此重要的人物，」Barlog此前在接受IGN独家专访时表示，该采访讨论了为何选择劳菲作为主角。「对我们来说，这不是偏离，而是一种扩展，」他补充道。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what else PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解PlayStation还准备了什么，这里是2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
